# Story: Migrate to new backend platform

## User Story

As a backend engineer, I want our services migrated to the new platform so that
deployment automation is consistent across environments.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC1: Given the legacy platform, when migration runs, then the new platform
  hosts every service.
